title: Foundation: Galactic Frontier
notes:
Update Highlights:
1. Optimized the duration of the Sacred Tribute Vessel, which is now set to 3 hours.
2. Improved the display of Guild Chest information by removing portrait frames.
3. Other optimizations and bug fixes.

title: Clash of Critters
notes:
1. Added new Lightning Tatari: Glowfly with unique Horde Invasion skills.
2. New Tier 4: Humbug→Hierotyrus (Rock), Zaplet→Umbraveil (Lightning).
3. Island Goldrush: Territory Defenders, faster point gains, league rewards final day.
4. Battle: class adjustments, Sand Control/Warship Roll fixes, Dojo bugfix.
5. Evolve Trials: preview higher tiers, event indicators, accurate switch tips.
6. Social: no invites/msgs from blocked players, profile via own avatar.

title: Heartopia
notes:
◆ Feature Updates and Optimizations ◆
[Hide & Seek Party]
A Hide & Seek Party has been added to the Party system. D.G. Members can play as Mysterious Grimkin Hosts, who transform into furniture and hide, or as Investigative Journalists, who use the Survey Drone to find and capture them.

[Parkour Party]
A Parkour Party has been added to the Party system. D.G. Members can use pillars, walls, and platforms to create obstacle courses and enjoy building challenges with others.
